name: lightbridge-skills
description: Reusable skills for AI coding agents — software engineering and radiology/medical-imaging.

plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Software engineering workflows: commits, reviews, refactoring, and language idioms.

plugins.name: radiology
plugins.description: Medical-imaging tooling references: DICOM via DCMTK, the Orthanc REST API, and 3D Slicer.

plugins.name: lightbridge
plugins.description: Personal workflow conventions — bootstrap and manage the .lightbridge personal config namespace (user-level, per-project).

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Agent-workflow and meta skills: grilling sessions, conversation handoffs, and skill authoring.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Deep-research harness: plan conversationally, execute autonomously into a cited report with resumable file state and pluggable backends.

plugins.name: notebook-tools
plugins.description: Safe cell-aware Jupyter notebook creation, inspection, editing, and clean-kernel execution.
